title: versioning — feature keys
description: Features exposed at `/auth/me` → `data.features`. Gate capability availability by plan.

features.description: Master toggle. When off, all requests default to the single 'v1' version. Rare — always on in practice.

Enables the transformer registry to compose chains across multiple version bumps (v3 → v2 → v1). Without this, subscribers pinned to older versions receive raw current-version payloads (backwards-incompatible).
Enables @api(version:) directive resolution + #[VersionedField] attribute stripping. Feature-flag guarded because GraphQL surface is v2 platform-scope.
Enables `?version=vN` resolution in production. Off by default — dev + testing + staging only — to avoid accidental version pinning by consumers using browsers or docs playgrounds.
When a version sunsets, automatically upgrade WebhookSubscriptions pinned to it (if migration_target_slug set). When off, pinned subscriptions are paused on sunset + customers must manually upgrade.

Enables customer notification fan-out on notice publish (mail + in-app). When off, notices are visible only via the docs page — no push signals. Off would violate RFC 8594 spirit but useful for legal orchestration edge cases.
